import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{TABS}from"./constants";import Today from"./components/Today";import Prompts from"./components/prompts";import Tracker from"./components/Tracker";import Journal from"./components/journal";import PanicHelp from"./components/PanicHelp";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[tab,setTab]=useState(0);const[allEntries,setAllEntries]=useState([]);// Load persisted entries on mount
useEffect(()=>{const load=async()=>{try{const raw=localStorage.getItem("mhj-all-entries");if(raw)setAllEntries(JSON.parse(raw));}catch{}};load();},[]);const persist=updated=>{setAllEntries(updated);localStorage.setItem("mhj-all-entries",JSON.stringify(updated));};const handleSave=data=>{const newEntry={id:Date.now().toString(),timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),...data};persist([newEntry,...allEntries]);};const handleDelete=id=>persist(allEntries.filter(e=>e.id!==id));const tabComponents=[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Today,{allEntries:allEntries,onSave:handleSave,onDelete:handleDelete}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Prompts,{onSave:handleSave}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tracker,{allEntries:allEntries}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Journal,{allEntries:allEntries,onDelete:handleDelete}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PanicHelp,{})];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{minHeight:"100vh",background:"#f8faf9",fontFamily:"'Segoe UI', sans-serif",color:"#2d3748"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e8f0ed",padding:"18px 24px 0"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{maxWidth:560,margin:"0 auto"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:{margin:0,fontSize:22,fontWeight:700,color:"#2d6a4f"},children:"\uD83C\uDF3F My Journal"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{margin:"2px 0 14px",fontSize:13,color:"#74a08a"},children:[new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN",{weekday:"long",month:"long",day:"numeric"})," · ",allEntries.length," ",allEntries.length===1?"entry":"entries"," saved"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:"flex",gap:4,overflowX:"auto",paddingBottom:1},children:TABS.map((t,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setTab(i),style:{background:tab===i?"#2d6a4f":"transparent",color:tab===i?"#fff":"#74a08a",border:"none",borderRadius:"8px 8px 0 0",padding:"8px 14px",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"},children:t},i))})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{maxWidth:560,margin:"0 auto",padding:"24px 20px"},children:tabComponents[tab]})]});}
